title: Subitem date's showing on "My Work Mobile"
excerpt: We use the “My Work” tool in anger, it is frustrating that on the mobile app you can’t see any works that have been assigned to you in a subitem only the main item.

posts.author: Mikey_Burningham (Mikey)
posts.cookedHtml: We use the “My Work” tool in anger, it is frustrating that on the mobile app you can’t see any works that have been assigned to you in a subitem only the main item.
